section_miscategorizations.text: I will increase the metformin dosage to 1000mg twice daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This dosage is already documented in the HPI as the current regimen ("He is currently taking metformin 1000mg twice daily"), so stating it as an increase in the Plan is internally inconsistent. However, it still functions as a treatment decision, so placement in Plan is largely acceptable and only a minor organizational issue.
